invalidates_if: Human requires the original 24-trace preregistered M2 packet before interpreting M2.
reason: The 24-trace Granite-Small M2 packet completed BF16/static-1/static-3 scoring but OOMed entering dynamic M2; rerunning the full 24 traces would block paper progress during vacation mode. The fixed first-12 trace slice preserves the M2 scientific question with wider uncertainty.
